narrative:
Rumley Township has 770 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.2 percentage points.
